The nOps public API provides programmatic access to cloud cost and usage insights, MAP migration project management, and essentials scheduler operations. It enables teams to monitor and analyze AWS environments, automate cost optimization tasks, and integrate nOps data into existing analytics tools and monitoring systems outside of the nOps dashboard.
